title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nucleus Software family as a Backend Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nucleus Software:
Nucleus Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software!
